name: Fantasy Life Simulator!
description:
Create your own journey full of excitement and wonder. Who are you? What will you do? Who will you fuck? Come write your own story!

Set in the fantastical Kingdom of Redveil, where strife and corruption run deep allowing for a world of opportunity. 

I advise you to make use of the "Forge your own path" option as much as possible, the other options are present to help inspire you or give you ideas.

All feedback is appreciated and welcome.

Enjoy ;)
creator: Andifaris
